name: Ku'damm 56 – Rebel with a Cause
overview: At the Berlin dance school "Galant," worlds collide and the struggle between prudishness and emancipation is carried out. The proprietor of the dance school, Caterina Schöllack, has three daughters whom she orders to integrate into this hierarchically structured society. Two of her daughters seem to abide by their mother's wish. Only Monika, the middle daughter, rejects the given path and discovers rock 'n' roll for herself.

trailers.title: Trailer - 2017 International Emmy Sonja Gerhardt in "Ku'damm 56"
